headline: How to Boost Your Portfolio with Top Consumer Discretionary Stocks Set to Beat Earnings

headline: A Look At MGM Resorts (MGM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves
summary: MGM Resorts International stock: context for recent moves MGM Resorts International (MGM) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$35.98 and posting a 5.4% gain over the past month despite a modest year to date decline. See our latest analysis for MGM Resorts International. Recent trading has been mixed, with a 5.4% 1 month share price return but a 1.4% decline year to date.
